title: Off-White × Xiaomi MI
description: Collaboration with Xiaomi MI: Off-White sneaker customization as part of a joint project. A unique design bridging street culture and a technology brand.

details.task: Create custom Off-White sneakers for a collaboration with Xiaomi MI.
details.solution: Developed a unique design merging Off-White aesthetics with the Xiaomi MI visual code.
details.result: An exclusive project highlighting the synergy between street fashion and technology.
